payload.label: wall switch
payload.long_description: Small white plastic rectangular faceplate with two vertical rocker switches mounted flush on a wall; surface shows slight scuffing/soiling and the image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, but the switch assembly fills most of the crop and is not edge-cut — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.
